heading: About Austin
paragraphs: Austin is a missionary devoted to reaching the college campus with the gospel, while also pursuing a lifelong passion for woodworking.
From a young age, Austin developed his craft, later spending 10 years building furniture in his dad's furniture store.
Today, he combines purpose and craftsmanship — creating custom woodworking pieces that bring depth, beauty, and character into homes, while helping support his family and their mission.
